title: Shutter Ruler Bidirectional Inertia Fix
scope: selected pending committed readback state separation

implementation.selected_state: horizontalRulerSelectedIndex uses pending shutter duration first, then runtime.
implementation.pending_state: pendingShutterWheelDurationSeconds plus lastDispatchedShutterTickIndex represent in-flight writes.
implementation.committed_state: committedShutterDurationSeconds plus committedShutterTickIndex are set only after readback confirms pending.
implementation.readback_rule: Readback logs but does not clear pending while isShutterRulerInteracting is true.
implementation.duplicate_guard_rule: Skip only when no pending, not dragging, target tick equals committed tick, and duration delta is below epsilon.
implementation.tick_spacing: Shutter ruler uses 18pt spacing; other parameters keep 24pt.
implementation.inertia: predictedEndTranslation can submit a bounded final inertia step, maximum 5 ticks.

xcodebuild.command: xcodebuild -scheme SellerCamera -project SellerCamera.xcodeproj -configuration Debug -destination 'generic/platform=iOS' -derivedDataPath /tmp/SellerCameraDerivedData CODE_SIGNING_ALLOWED=NO clean build

device.notes: True-device validation is still required for bidirectional drag, inertia feel, haptic cadence, and write frequency.

risks: Inertia is intentionally lightweight and may need device-tuned strength adjustment.
True-device logs should verify readback does not clear pending during active drag.
Very fast repeated swipes should be checked for write frequency and haptic density.
